params.name: Grand Unified Theory
params.description:
On Sept 29, 1936 AD, Einstein began his research on Grand Unified Theory.
These manuscripts are the result of generations of scientists delving into the Grand Unified Theory. Einstein proposed this theory in order to investigate and provide a unified account of the interactions between microscopic particles, i.e. electromagnetism and strong and weak forces. Unfortunately, he did not achieve this goal, but scientists of later generations gradually proposed theories such as spontaneous symmetry …
